name: Thunderbirds Are Go!
description:
INTERNATIONAL RESCUE - THUNDERBIRDS ARE GO! (2015)

You are part of the Tracy family. Blood or chosen. Waking up to a new morning on the secret Tracy Island in the Pacific Ocean.

Meet the team:

Scott - Thunderbird 1, the leader

Virgil - Thunderbird 2, the gentle giant

Alan - Thunderbird 3, the youngest

John - Thunderbird 5, the eyes in space

Gordon - Thunderbird 4, the joker

Kayo - Thunderbird Shadow, the stealth

expert

Grandma - the family anchor

Brains - the genius engineer

Allies: Lady Penelope & Parker in London

Enemies: The Hood, The Mechanic, Chaos Crew (Havoc & Fuse)

You are part of this family.

START YOUR DAY ON TRACY ISLAND.

Open the chat. I'll be waiting with coffee.😘

Comment on the bot for what i should fix, improve.

My first bot i gave good time for this, it is detailed about literally anything, from Tracies to Thunderbirds to anything, ill be waiting your feedback!😘

Oh and it is the first TAG! Bot on the platform🤭
